name: Sentry
summary: Surface production errors + issues from Sentry so the incident posture is real, not guessed.
description: Lists and inspects Sentry issues/errors for your apps so the control center's core question -- 'is it healthy?' -- is answered from production reality. Pairs naturally with the incident-scanner agent. Uses Sentry's official MCP server (hosted remote OAuth, or self-hosted stdio + token).

requires.label: A Sentry auth token (self-hosted/stdio) -- or use the hosted remote server with OAuth
Your Sentry host/org (e.g. org.sentry.io) if self-hosted
